plugin.name: EnigmAgent Vault
plugin.description:
EnigmAgent Vault — Secure local credential management for AI agent developers.
Store API keys, tokens, and passwords in a local AES-256-GCM encrypted vault. Reference them as {{PLACEHOLDER}} in your code, HTTP requests, and launch configurations. Integrates with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, n8n, and 40+ AI frameworks.
Features: - Vault status view — know instantly if your vault is running and unlocked - Secret browser — list names and domains, never values - Quick-copy {{PLACEHOLDER}} references to clipboard - Settings page for host/port configuration - Zero telemetry, fully local

command.name: EnigmAgent: Check Vault Status
command.description: Check if the EnigmAgent vault is running and unlocked

command.name: EnigmAgent: Copy {{Placeholder}}
command.description: Copy a vault secret as a {{PLACEHOLDER}} reference
